_description: Checkpoint file for the BCG contact batch runner. Tracks progress through historical email archive to build known-associates.md. Updated automatically after each batch. Do not edit manually unless recovering from a corrupted run.
notes: Set status to 'not_started' to trigger a fresh run from the beginning. Set to 'in_progress' during active processing. Set to 'complete' when all historical emails have been processed. Set to 'paused' to safely stop and resume later.
